name: @absolutejs/health
description: Liveness + readiness probes for the AbsoluteJS substrate. createHealthChecker composes named checks; healthPlugin exposes /healthz (process alive?) + /readyz (can serve traffic?) with a standard JSON envelope. Per-check timeout, aggregate worst-of-any status, Cache-Control: no-store.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external elysia && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run check:package && bun publish
